sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70648" key="nh/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νήκ-της</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">νήχω</etym>) <sense id="n70648.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">swimmer,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:97" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.97</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐχθρὸν ἀεὶ νήκτῃσι</foreign> prob. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0584.tlg001:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philosteph.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
